title: Smokescreen caps hit roll to 1 die

card.rawText: The equipped creature can only roll 1 Hit Die for the next 2 turn cycles.

plan.title: Smokescreen caps hit roll to 1 die
plan.summary: Verify equipped target can roll only 1 hit die for 2 turn cycles while dice-limit effect is active.

notes: Player_1 should have Smokescreen in hand and a creature target in play.

steps: Advance to Combat while effect is active.
Open hit roll and verify only 1D6 is used/accepted.
Advance two turn cycles and verify cap expires.

expectedAssertions.label: Dice limit effect exists on target

manualVerification: Confirm standard magic goes to cemetery after resolving and does not occupy an infinite magic slot.
riskNotes: Equip wording may not create a persistent equipment card; effect is temporary and source-unlinked.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Supported prompt and battle roll cap; verify duration cleanup.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
